title: Iseilema argutum
uses: Iseilema argutum is reported to have various medicinal properties. It is traditionally used to treat fever, headache, and other health issues. The plant is also believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. However, more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects. taxonomy: Iseilema argutum is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Chloridoideae. The genus Iseilema is part of the tribe Cynodonteae. Iseilema argutum is native to India and Sri Lanka, and it is also found in other parts of Asia. The classification of Iseilema argutum is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic features.
